corrections.location: v.16 first line after verse number
corrections.current: 16 ἐκλεκτοὶ αὐτοῦ, καὶ οὐκ ἔσται ἰσχὺς τοῦ στῆναι.
corrections.correct: 16 καὶ ποιήσει ὁ B ἐκλεκτοὶ αὐτοῦ, καὶ οὐκ ἔσται ἰσχὺς τοῦ στῆναι.
corrections.note: The page clearly has the phrase 'καὶ ποιήσει ὁ B' immediately after the verse number before ἐκλεκτοί.
Accent placement in the image is σαβείρ.
The phrase 'καὶ οὐκ ἐν' is present at the end of the line before the next line continues 'προσώποις...'.
Printed text reads πίστι χώραις, not πίστει χώρας.
The apparatus line numbered 22 is missing and was replaced by a duplicate/misnumbered 21 entry.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but one phrase omitted at v.16, another at v.20, and v.24 has two word-form errors. Apparatus mostly matches except the line for 22 was mistranscribed as a duplicate 21 entry.
